risk: Audit status can drift from merged repository truth.
mitigation: Cross-check audit ledger against this TSV source.
closure: Closed and verified by freshness validation.

risk: Route plans can pass while naming weak sources.
mitigation: Require concrete source checks for changed targets.
closure: Closed and verified by source checks.

risk: Connector evidence can omit target impact details.
mitigation: Require source action result decision and target linkage.
closure: Closed and verified by target-link simulations.

risk: Progress notes can be backfilled after work ends.
mitigation: Require ordered lifecycle checkpoints before merge.
closure: Closed and verified by ordered fixtures.

risk: Lesson records can contain weak generic content.
mitigation: Require cause evidence regression and prevention content.
closure: Closed and verified by negative fixtures.

risk: Reusable asset feedback can be missing or unrelated.
mitigation: Require exact asset feedback evidence and waiver coverage.
closure: Closed and verified by exact feedback checks.

risk: Documentation assets can be skipped during project planning.
mitigation: Require documentation reference evidence or waiver.
closure: Closed and verified by asset evidence checks.

risk: RTK can be mentioned without auditable impact.
mitigation: Require auditable RTK impact evidence fields.
closure: Closed and verified by RTK impact fixtures.

risk: Graph output can exist without target use.
mitigation: Require target-linked graph evidence for writes.
closure: Closed and verified by wrong-target fixtures.

risk: Structural hygiene issues can hide beyond simple checks.
mitigation: Add semantic cleanup and stale reference CI gates.
closure: Closed and verified by CI policy gates.

risk: Review evidence can be absent or vague.
mitigation: Require structured PR review evidence fields.
closure: Closed and verified by PR policy gate.

risk: Post-merge repair path can remain unobserved.
mitigation: Simulate repair issue path with safe fake gh.
closure: Closed and verified by fake-gh repair simulation.

risk: Connector selection rules can miss inventory items.
mitigation: Use manifest tied to MCP connector inventory.
closure: Closed and verified by manifest coverage fixtures.

risk: Connector result evidence can remain vague.
mitigation: Require concrete result identifiers in evidence.
closure: Closed and verified by result identifier fixtures.

risk: Template selection rules can miss inventory items.
mitigation: Move template rules into a manifest with coverage.
closure: Closed when every template has a rule or exemption.

risk: Required patterns can be omitted from plans.
mitigation: Add registry-driven required-pattern checker.
closure: Closed when checker and fixtures are complete.

risk: Skill selection rules can miss inventory items.
mitigation: Tie skill rules to inventory and waiver coverage.
closure: Closed when inventory-tied skill rules land.

risk: Changed files can omit implied capabilities.
mitigation: Map changed paths to capability identifiers.
closure: Closed when staged-change guard lands.

risk: Significant agent runs can skip trace evidence.
mitigation: Extend trace triggers and waiver validation.
closure: Closed when triggers and fixtures land.

risk: Replaceable waivers can hide fixture gaps.
mitigation: Replace waivers and add by-design token.
closure: Closed when fixtures and schema land.

risk: Missing tools only warn in CI environments.
mitigation: Hard-fail declared missing tools in CI.
closure: Closed when CI contract lands.

risk: Newest plan selection can choose wrong plans.
mitigation: Add target-aware fail-closed plan selection.
closure: Closed when fail-closed selection lands.

risk: Review validator lacks fixture coverage.
mitigation: Extract validator and add negative fixtures.
closure: Closed when script and fixtures land.

risk: Merge readiness evidence is unstructured.
mitigation: Require PR-body merge readiness artifact.
closure: Closed when artifact validation lands.

risk: Downstream installed behavior is not tested.
mitigation: Extend generated target behavior tests.
closure: Closed when downstream behavior tests land.
